{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Brightcrown crest
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Brightcrown crest]] is a crowned oak tree.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
